title: rosa mollissima var. pseudorubiginosa
intro: Rosa mollissima var. pseudorubiginosa, also known as the 'Pseudorubiginosa Rose', is a variety of the Rosa mollissima plant, a species of rose native to China. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to promote digestion and relieve symptoms of dyspepsia, due to its content of glycosides and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rosa mollissima var. pseudorubiginosa include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, with herbal preparations often involving the flowers and leaves of the plant.
